title: Music Hath Charms
director: Thomas Bentley, Alexander Esway, Walter Summers
writer: Jack Davies, L. du Garde Peach, Courtney Terrett
actors: Henry Hall, W.H. Berry, Carol Goodner
plot: Strange film intertwining several vignettes involving Henry Hall and his BBC dance orchestra, in the studio at broadcast house, and their mishaps at children's outing, and how their music affects listeners on a luxury liner at sea...
